course_title: APPLICATIONS OF GEOGRAPHIC INFORMATION SYSTEMS IN NATURAL RESOURCES
description: Course has four components: 1) Detailed review of GIS concepts; 2) Case studies; 3) GIS implementation methods; 4) Laboratory to provide "hands-on" GIS experience.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: LAND ARC 211orENVIR ST/​CIV ENGR/​GEOG  377or graduate/professional standing
